nasb.text: Of Merari was the family of the Mahlites and the family of the Mushites; these were the families of Merari.

esv.text: To Merari belonged the clan of the Mahlites and the clan of the Mushites: these are the clans of Merari.

cnv.text: 屬米拉利的，有抹利家族和母示家族；這些是米拉利的家族。

ccb.text: 米拉利宗族有抹利和姆示两个家族，
